scripts.lint: pnpm run audit:repo && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:web && pnpm run lint:rust
scripts.verify:all: pnpm run audit:repo && pnpm run docs:mintlify:check && pnpm run lint:web && pnpm --filter @elata-biosciences/eeg-web verify:publish && pnpm --filter @elata-biosciences/eeg-web-ble verify:publish && pnpm --filter @elata-biosciences/rppg-web verify:publish && pnpm --filter @elata-biosciences/create-elata-demo verify:publish && pnpm run validate:tarballs
